steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The ethicists' view: morality is independent of context. Purcell's finding: Aztec ethics makes morality dependent on role and community—exactly opposite.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: A correctly infers that Aztecs would reject context-independent moral standards. B, C, and D either add claims not in the passage or mischaracterize the Aztec framework. That matches choice A—A is correct.
